latin: Nocte obscura, creatura oculos aperuit. Victor Frankenstein, creator eius, horrificatus retro cessit. opus manuum suarum vivebat — sed non erat pulchrum. erat terribile.

questions.prompt: How does Victor react when the creature opens its eyes?

translation: On a dark night, the creature opened its eyes. Victor Frankenstein, its creator, stepped back in horror. The work of his hands was alive — but it was not beautiful. It was terrible.
